content.en:
"God, you're really amazing!"

Tsurukage praised.

He couldn't use any words to describe Ye Tian's demon at the moment, it was simply beyond his cognition.

But if he knew that Ye Tian had actually passed the fourth level and obtained the inheritance of Hu Yi, an ancient demon-level existence, he would be even more dumbfounded.

Of course, the Ancient Demon Grade Inheritance, even in a tribe like the Golden God Ministry, is also of high value, I'm afraid that only a few emperor-level existences can obtain it!

Therefore, it is impossible for Ye Tian to reveal it.

......

Ye Tian originally thought that the Golden God Department would come to recruit him, after all, he broke into the fourth level as a general this time.

But until the end, the Golden God Department left and did not come to recruit him.

It's not that the Golden God Ministry looks down on him, but that the Golden God Department doesn't lack an emperor.

For the Golden God Department, there are a lot of emperor-level, and a general from a middle tribe, even if he will become an emperor-level in the future, they are not lacking, they can't cultivate Ye Tian to the ancient demon level, right?

If Ye Tian is not cultivated to the ancient demon level, then there is no need to recruit Ye Tian.

But Ye Tian was not born in the Golden God Department after all, so naturally he would not cultivate Ye Tian heavily.

Therefore, these powerhouses of the Golden God Department left directly, and they didn't care too much about Ye Tian.

For Ye Tian, this is a good thing, otherwise he really went to the Golden God Department, and he tied 750 hands and feet at the beginning.

After all, he is the ultimate supreme master, even if he recultivates in this era, he still doesn't need the guidance of others, and he has now obtained the ancient demon level inheritance, and there is no shortage of inheritance.

For him, low-key cultivation is the most important thing.

"We'll go too!"

Patriarch Tsurukage said.

Wow!!!!

The three of them left quickly, and they were very careful when leaving, after all, many tribes have conflicts with each other, and this time some of them received rewards from the ruins, maybe they will be attacked.

But they were lucky and didn't get attacked.

Along the way, they arrived at the Eagle Department very safely.

After returning, Crane Shadow and another elder went to retreat to practice and digest the harvest this time, while Ye Tian continued to guard the Nome vein.

And for the first time, he took out the Ten Realms Golden Demon Fruit to improve his physical body.

Grunt!

He swallowed this Ten Realms Golden Demon Fruit in one gulp, and the terrifying energy swept through his body, frantically refining his physical body and enhancing the ultimate particles in his physical body.

With each passing moment, his physical body grew stronger.

Time flies.

After a period of time, the energy of this Ten Realms Golden Demon Fruit was exhausted, and Ye Tian's cultivation had reached the peak of the general level, and he was not far from the extreme of the general level.

"Very good, a Ten Realms Golden Magic Fruit saves a long time of penance!" Ye Tian muttered.

He only needs to cultivate for a while before he can hit the king level.

Although the king level is not very strong, at least in the general tribe, the king level also belongs to the high-level, and the general level is honestly stronger than the ordinary cannon fodder.

And if he breaks through to the king level, his combat power is definitely no less than that of a weaker emperor-level existence.

Immediately, Ye Tiancai began to truly study the knowledge in the Ancient Demon-level inheritance.

In fact, he had completely browsed through the knowledge of the Ancient Demon Inheritance, and his understanding of the Ultimate Dao was even more thorough.

Moreover, he also knew a secret, that is, the ultimate ancient demon was not an ordinary ancient demon-level existence.

The general Ancient Demon level existence is the realm before him, and if he comprehends the Ultimate Rule Realm, such an Ancient Demon level is called the top Ancient Demon level.

An ultimate supreme like the Doomsday Extreme Venerable is a top-notch ancient demon-level existence.

The ultimate rule realm is a great achievement, and the ancient demon-level ultimate body is called the pinnacle ancient demon-level existence.

If the Ultimate Rule Realm is consummated, the Ancient Demon-level Ultimate Body is consummated, and the Ultimate Will reaches the Ultimate Ancient Demon-level will, such an Ancient Demon-level existence can be called the Ultimate Ancient Demon.

And there is another existence above the Ultimate Ancient Demon - the space-time level Ultimate Ancient Demon!

The space-time level ultimate ancient demon is also the pursuit of every ultimate ancient demon (cgdg), this ultimate ancient demon can surpass the ultimate time and space, even if countless time and space are destroyed, this space-time level extreme demon will not die.

However, no one has yet been able to reach such a state.

"Time-space level ultimate ancient demon, there shouldn't be any ancient demon who has reached this realm, if it does, the era of the ultimate ancient demon will not be ended!"

And this fallen Fox Yi Ancient Demon is actually just a top-notch Ultimate Ancient Demon, which can be regarded as very powerful, comparable to the Doomsday Extreme, in terms of real combat power, it may still be above the Doomsday Extreme.

It's a pity that he still hasn't reached the peak ultimate ancient demon level after all, and if he does, maybe he won't fall.

"In my time, not all of those sleeping Ancient Demons were Ultimate Ancient Demons, some of them should be peak Ancient Demon-level existences, and the number of Ultimate Ancient Demons should still be a minority!" Ye Tian judged.

After obtaining the inheritance of the ancient demon-level existence, he learned more about the life pattern, he not only obtained the complete life pattern in the ruins before, but now he has obtained relevant knowledge in the inheritance, and he suddenly understands the life pattern more thoroughly.

Immediately, he was ready to slightly transform his physical body to make the ultimate particle combination in his body more perfect.

And this transformation is a long time.

this day.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian's physical body began to transform, this was not to break through to the king level, but the transformation of the physical body was completed, and the ultimate particle combination was more perfect, which was equivalent to indirectly improving the bloodline.

At this moment, he is equivalent to having the bloodline of an ancient demon-level existence, almost equivalent to a weakened ancient demon-level physique.

"It's very powerful, my current combat power is enough to beat any king. "

Ye Tian muttered.

And at this time, he has already raised his cultivation to the extreme of the general level.

Then, he began to attack the king level.

In a thought, cultivation became a qualitative change, and the ultimate body of ten thousand laws broke through from the beginning to the realm of Xiaocheng, and the physical body began to transform wildly.

Endless ultimate particle energy poured into his body from the outside world, and such a huge transformation, Elder Tuo and those soldier-level miners also sensed it.

"This is the town guard to make the Lord break through to the king level??? this movement is too big!"

Saya exclaimed.

Area 1.

Elder Tuo looked at Ye Tian's position, "Tian, he has finally broken through to the king level, when Tian was at the general level, he almost had the combat power of the king level, and now that he has broken through, he may have surpassed the combat power of the patriarch." "。
